tasks.title: Implement src/cli.ts
tasks.description:
Modify: Register `setup slack` subcommand

REVIEW FAIL (code): Command requires project config — US-001.
  WHERE: src/cli.ts:114-119
  EXPECTED: `gwrk setup slack` should work without a local .gwrkrc.json (global setup).
  ACTUAL: `loadConfig(process.cwd())` is called for `slack` command, causing exit 1 if no .gwrkrc.json.
  FIX: Update preAction hook to exclude 'slack' command: `actionCommand.name() !== 'slack'`.
  REF: spec.md US-001, FR-001

tasks.title: Implement src/utils/config.ts
tasks.description:
Modify: Add Zod schema for Slack tokens, fail-fast validation

REVIEW FAIL (code): Regression in loadConfig — DM-001.
  WHERE: src/utils/config.ts:33-47
  EXPECTED: Configuration change should not break existing system tests.
  ACTUAL: New REQUIRED fields (server.heartbeatIntervalMs, server.networkCheckIntervalMs, parallelism) broke 7+ test suites.
  FIX: Update all test mocks to include required fields or provide default values in loadConfig().
  REF: plan.md Phase 1 > DM-001

tasks.title: Implement test strategy for Phase 1
tasks.description:
Implement all unit and integration tests defined in the phase test strategy.

REVIEW FAIL (code): Build failure — Global.
  WHERE: src/server/dispatch.ts and src/server/slack-messages.ts
  EXPECTED: Project builds with zero errors.
  ACTUAL: 15 errors in 2 files.
  FIX: Fix imports and exports in Phase 3 files (T013, T016).
  GATE: gates/T006-gate.sh assertion #3
  REF: plan.md Phase 1 > Done When

REVIEW FAIL (code): Test and Lint failures — TR-001, TR-002.
  WHERE: src/commands/init.ts, src/commands/ship.ts, src/server/slack-channel.ts, src/server/slack-notify.ts, src/utils/config.test.ts, src/scripts-e2e.test.ts
  EXPECTED: Zero lint errors in critical paths, all tests pass (unit + e2e).
  ACTUAL: 21 lint errors (noExplicitAny), config schema mismatch in tests, e2e reference error (cleanupState).
  FIX: Fix lint errors, update config.test.ts to match new schema, fix e2e test references.
  GATE: gates/T006-gate.sh
  REF: plan.md Phase 1 > Test Strategy

New: Block Kit message builders for 7 event types

REVIEW FAIL (code): Import error.
  WHERE: src/server/slack-messages.ts:1
  EXPECTED: import type { AnyBlock, MessageAttachment } from "@slack/bolt" should work.
  ACTUAL: Module '"@slack/bolt"' has no exported member 'AnyBlock' or 'MessageAttachment'.
  FIX: Use proper block types from `@slack/types` or `KnownBlock` from `@slack/bolt`.
